│ │ Dashboard            ││ Use the left menu to navigate and Ctrl+F to switch │
│ │ Overview of Ralph a… ││                                                    │
│                        ││                                                    │
│   Run Loop             ││                                                    │
│   Run loop controls    ││                                                    │
│                        ││                                                    │
│   Build Specs          ││                                                    │
│   Specs builder        ││                                                    │
│                        ││                                                    │
│   Task Builder         ││                                                    │
│   Queue task builder   ││                                                    │
│                        ││                                                    │
│   Pin                  ││                                                    │
│   Pin manager          ││                                                    │
│                        ││                                                    │
│   ••                   ││                                                    │
╰────────────────────────╯╰────────────────────────────────────────────────────╯

ctrl+q quit • ctrl+n toggle nav • ctrl+f toggle focus • ctrl+h toggle help …
